# PERF-030 positive: context.Background called from a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-030-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Background(c *gin.Context) {
	go func() {
		ctx := context.Background()
		_ = ctx
	}()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
